item.title: Version 1.0.27
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.27 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * Fix: 修复 DisplayBrightness 各 backend 的数据竞争（加锁保护 display 与缓存） by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/112 * Fix: LaunchControl 在 macOS 14+ 上正确识别被禁用的启动项（解析 enabled/disabled） by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/116 * Fix: resumePlugin 复用插件原始运行时上下文（修隐藏/显示后资源目录漂移） by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/117
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.26...v1.0.27
